mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly boosting S&P 500 valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment, or Rank IC > 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and housing starts indicate a synchronized demand shock across goods and services sectors, compressing corporate margins and equity valuations.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns do not exhibit a statistically significant negative skew when both INDPRO and HOUST decline simultaneously over a 60-day window.

mechanism_narrative: Tightening commercial and industrial lending standards, proxied by declining RSAFS balances, restrict corporate working capital and investment, leading to lower equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC between RSAFS changes and 5-day SPX returns remains above -0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real purchasing power and forces preemptive monetary tightening, which increases discount rates and compresses equity multiples.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive or neutral when CPIAUCSL exceeds the 0.4% monthly threshold, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous job losses and rising unemployment rates confirm a broad-based labor market deterioration, triggering recession fears that drive sustained negative equity returns.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns are not significantly lower during months where PAYEMS declines and UNRATE rises concurrently, or the interaction term fails to improve model R-squared by at least 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production capacity signals robust aggregate supply and healthy corporate throughput, supporting earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the short term.
failure_condition: Positive correlation between INDPRO month-over-month changes and 5-day SPX returns breaks down during periods of supply chain disruption, or Rank IC drops below 0.04 over a 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly contraction in real GDP growth confirms a technical recession, which historically precedes severe equity drawdowns and suppresses forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns average positive or zero during quarters where GDPC1 contracts year-over-year, or the hypothesis fails to reject the null of zero predictive power in a 5-year walk-forward test.
